systems.name: plan-builder skill
systems.description: Claude Code skill exposing plan lifecycle management via slash command and scripts

systems.name: Repo File System
systems.description: Git-controlled working tree containing plans/ (legacy) and specs/ (new) directories

systems.name: beta-workflow skill
systems.description: Downstream skill that materializes runtime todo from tasks.md

systems.name: miatdiagram skill
systems.description: Companion skill producing idef0.json and grafcet.json

containers.name: Skill Prompt Layer
containers.description: SKILL.md content presented to LLM as operational context

containers.name: Scripts Runtime
containers.description: Bun-executed TypeScript scripts for deterministic operations

containers.name: Templates & Schemas
containers.description: Artifact templates + JSON Schemas packaged with the skill

components.name: SKILL.md
components.description: Usage contract, state×artifact matrix, mode×transition matrix, migration rules

components.name: plan-state.ts
components.description: Read .state.json; trigger on-touch migration if legacy

components.name: plan-promote.ts
components.description: Validate artifact requirements for target state; write history and update state

components.name: plan-validate.ts
components.description: State-aware artifact validator: validates only artifacts required for current state

components.name: plan-migrate.ts
components.description: Explicit migration entry; reuses ensureNewFormat library

components.name: plan-archive.ts
components.description: Promote state to archived; optional physical move to specs/archive/

components.name: plan-gaps.ts
components.description: Analyze spec for code-independence gaps (missing schema, abstract GWT, no errors, etc.)

components.name: ensure-new-format.ts
components.description: Idempotent helper: detect legacy plans/ path, trigger migration, log every action

components.name: state-inference.ts
components.description: Deterministic state inference from legacy artifact combination; throws StateInferenceError on miss

components.name: state.schema.json
components.description: JSON Schema for .state.json (state enum, history entry shape, profile array)

components.name: plan-sync.ts
components.description: Detect code-spec drift via git diff; emit WARN + write .state.json.history without blocking commit

components.name: plan-rollback-refactor.ts
components.description: Restore artifact set from .history/refactor-*/ to undo a refactor snapshot

components.name: inline-delta.ts
components.description: Helper for injecting inline delta markers, SUPERSEDED tags and version prefixes into Markdown artifacts

components.name: snapshot.ts
components.description: Helper that git mv artifacts into .history/refactor-YYYY-MM-DD/ for refactor mode

relationships.description: SKILL.md instructs LLM to invoke plan-init.ts for new specs
SKILL.md references plan-state.ts for state inquiry
SKILL.md references plan-promote.ts for state transitions
SKILL.md references plan-validate.ts for state-aware validation
plan-state calls ensureNewFormat before reading state
plan-promote calls ensureNewFormat before promotion
plan-validate calls ensureNewFormat before validation
plan-gaps calls ensureNewFormat before analysis
plan-migrate directly invokes ensureNewFormat
ensureNewFormat delegates state inference to state-inference lib
ensureNewFormat executes git mv and writes .state.json
plan-promote validates .state.json writes against schema
plan-validate reads .state.json schema to interpret state value
plan-init reads core templates to scaffold artifacts per state
plan-init reads SSDLC templates when profile=ssdlc enabled
beta-workflow reads tasks.md from specs/<slug>/ (post-migration path)
miatdiagram generates idef0.json and grafcet.json into specs/<slug>/
plan-archive calls ensureNewFormat before archiving
plan-archive optionally git mv to specs/archive/
beta-workflow invokes plan-sync after each task checkbox toggle
plan-sync reads git diff and compares with spec artifacts to detect drift
plan-promote --mode refactor delegates artifact snapshot to snapshot lib
plan-promote --mode amend/revise/extend delegates inline delta marker injection
plan-rollback-refactor restores artifacts from .history/refactor-*/
